= IKE Workspace Extension

image:https://img.shields.io/maven-central/v/network.ike.tooling/ike-workspace-extension[Maven Central,link=https://central.sonatype.com/artifact/network.ike.tooling/ike-workspace-extension]

Maven 4 build extension that prunes non-existent &lt;subprojects&gt;
        entries from workspace POMs before model validation. Lets a
        fresh clone of an IKE workspace bootstrap with mvn ws:scaffold-init
        before any subproject directory is on disk.

[cols="1,2",options="autowidth"]
